item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kita perlu mencari solusi yang seimbang antara kebutuhan kolektif dan kebebasan pribadi, bukan hanya memilih salah satu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that Indonesian social and collective safety interests are often prioritized, then shifts to an explicit balance position after Agent B emphasizes individual-rights protection and infrastructure displacement. Agent B remains mostly balance/rights-protective throughout and ends slightly against unqualified society-first priority. Agent A turn 5 has awkward Indonesian phrasing, but the stance is still readable.
